name: Rev'd Up Racing
short_description: Rev'd Up Racing is a fast paced, action packed arcade racing game which will push your driving skills to the limit. Destroy the competition and prove that you are an expert racer in a variety of events and challenges including, tournaments, time trials, drifts and more.
detailed_description:
Get behind the wheel and show off your driving skills and car control in this action packed arcade racer. Race your way to success and unlock new items along the way in a variety of exciting race events and unique challenges that will test your skills to the limit.

Unlock and master the handling of new cars as you progress to higher tier vehicles with more extreme performance capabilities, and beat the competition to prove that you are truly the best. Master a variety of unique and challenging tracks with tricky turns, complex chicanes and speedy straights.

Game Features

  • 14 unique cars, 5 car classes and over 60 skins to choose from
  • 14 fun and challenging tracks to master and top the leaderboard
  • Event mode where you can unlock and purchase new cars and skins with your hard earned credits
  • Challenge mode will test your handling skills to the max and help you become a racing god
  • Fun but challenging car physics will keep you searching for that perfect lap
  • Locate collectables scattered throughout the tracks for extra rewards
  • Race against friends or other players in online mode
